title: Richard's Coffee and Tea Mod
description: A mod that adds coffee and tea to Minecraft along with everything required to create them. Includes Coffee and Tea bushes, cups, mortar and pestles, and potion effects. All items have 3d models.
body:
Richard's Coffee & Tea Mod is a Forge-based Mod that fully implements coffee and tea in the game including plants, cups (with custom 3d models), seeds, and potion effects from each drink. In older versions coffee and tea plants can be found growing in plains and extreme hills biomes and coffee and tea leaves can be found in dungeon and mineshaft chests. Note this has not been added to 1.20 version yet, but in all versions you can also break tall grass to get coffee beans and tea seeds.

## Supported Mods for 1.20 version (Optional)
- **[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)**: The 1.20 version of the Coffee and Mod integrates with AppleSkin to quickly see how much hunger you will gain when drinking your coffee or tea.
- **[Survive](https://modrinth.com/mod/survive)**: The latest the version of the mod for with Survive's thirst and temperature system allowing your drinks to warm you and regain thirst.

## Language Support
- English
- Korean (thanks to LazyGom)
- German (v1.2.4 and up - possibly not fully accurate)
- I will gladly accept and add additional translations to mod and credit you! 

## Credits
- Pharade contributed many of the textures and images.
- LazyGom contributed the Korean translation.
